must_detect.matched_text:
Silver Bamboo JSC — Personal Data Processing & MNPI Handling Notice (VN Decree 13; Securities Law), issuer listed on Saigon Frontier Exchange (SFX).
Scope applies to employees, investors, and counterparties; controller contact dataprivacy@silverbamboo.vn; hotline +84-28-6012-0099; SCV reference no. SCV-FIC-4217.
For Mr. Tran Quoc Minh (SB-EMP-0421), we process contact and payroll data, VietLac Bank acct 5300-***-9812, and biometric fingerprint template hash 9f:a3:7c:xx:3d.
We also process his health data (hypertension treatment at Hoa Truc Clinic, Rx code HTR-0xB7) and trade union membership (Lotus Manufacturing Union ID LMU-77-093) under consent per Decree 13.
His minor child, Ms. Tran Ngoc Lan (age 12), school record at Camellia Grove School, guardian email minh.t@silverbamboo.vn; genetics refers to our fraud genetic algorithms, not personal genomes.
Lawful bases: labor contract, compliance with VN Securities Law and banking rules, and explicit consent for special-category data; withdraw consent via https://portal.silverbamboo.vn/dsar?ref=SFX-2025&user=tran_minh_0x7f.
MNPI means issuer or securities information not yet public with significant price impact; examples include unannounced Q3 guidance, SFX buyback calendar, and BambooLink card margin changes.
Employees including Mr. Minh are restricted from trading during blackout windows; receiving MNPI does not constitute a material adverse change in employment or financing documents.
Third-party transfers: LotusPay Gateway (payment processing, Thu Phong City) and CloudRice Pte. Ltd. (backup, Singapore) under cross-border transfer registration and contractual safeguards; onward transfers audited.
Banking logs are archived per Vietl•••ac  B a n k service agreement; retention is 5 years for transaction records and 2 years for access logs; MNPI files retained until public disclosure on SFX.
Data subject rights: access, correction, deletion, restriction, and portability; submit DSAR at https://portal.silverbamboo.vn/dsar#form?case=DSAR-11&lang=vi or post to 12 Phuong Nam St., District 1, Thu Phong City, VN.
We may use camera footage and face template data for office entry; M r .  T r a n   Q u o c   M i n h consented on 01-03-2026; template id: FACE_7—qp; emergency contact +84-90-000-1212.
Religious belief of Mr. Minh: registered Buddhist practice (pagoda: Thien Truc) processed only to administer leave; sexual orientation is not collected; political opinions are not profiled.
disclosure to analysts is limited to public info; pre-listing valuation models are MNPI; our health check of systems is routine and does not relate to a person’s medical data.
